task_completion.description: Checks if the Objective and Eyepiece convex lenses are placed on the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two convex lens shapes on the central axis in draw.io. The Objective lens should be on the left (at the 0 mark) and the Eyepiece on the right.

task_completion.description: Checks if the Focal Point is explicitly marked between the lenses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a distinct mark, dot, or crosshair between the two lenses representing the intermediate image location.

task_completion.description: Checks if three rays enter parallel and converge at the focal point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three lines (Top, Center, Bottom) coming from the left, parallel to the central axis, hitting the Objective lens, and angling to intersect exactly at the marked Focal Point.

task_completion.description: Checks if the rays exit the eyepiece parallel to the axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the three rays continuing from the Focal Point, hitting the Eyepiece lens, and exiting to the right parallel to each other and the central axis.

task_completion.description: Checks for the required text labels and dimension lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text labels 'Objective', 'Eyepiece', and 'Focal Point'. Also look for dimension lines or brackets indicating the focal lengths (fo and fe).

task_completion.description: Checks if the lens separation matches the 400mm and 80mm specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visually estimate the distance from the Objective to the Focal Point (fo) versus the Focal Point to the Eyepiece (fe). The 'fo' distance should be visibly 5 times longer than the 'fe' distance.

task_completion.description: Checks if the diagram was exported as a PDF to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io export dialog confirming a PDF save, or a file manager/terminal showing 'telescope_ray_diagram.pdf' created in '~/Diagrams/exports/'.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the draw.io GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the draw.io interface with the agent actively dragging shapes, drawing lines, and typing text, rather than just writing XML code in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verifies the PDF was exported using the application's export function.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent navigating to File -> Export as -> PDF in draw.io, rather than using a terminal command to rename a file extension to .pdf.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent drew the diagram from scratch rather than importing a pre-existing image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the diagram consists of individual vector shapes and lines native to draw.io, not a single pasted raster image of a telescope ray diagram.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The objective lens focal length (fo) is 400 mm (400 pixels or 40 grid units). The eyepiece focal length (fe) is 80 mm (80 pixels or 8 grid units). The total distance between the lenses should be 480 mm (480 pixels or 48 grid units). The scale is 1 pixel = 1 mm (1 grid unit = 10 mm). The diagram must be exported to '/home/ga/Diagrams/exports/telescope_ray_diagram.pdf'.
